event: A Baptism Ceremony in a Bourgeois Setting
description: A large parlor scene depicting a baptism ceremony in a well-appointed Victorian interior. At left, a priest in black with a white surplice holds an infant in a white christening gown, performing the rite while the mother in a white dress stands nearby. Numerous family members and guests fill the room, seated and standing in formal Victorian attire. The room features a large window at right with plants, tapestries on the walls, and elegant furnishings. Children sit on the floor in the foreground. The palette is rich with warm interior tones.
